features: Added shared workflow status/stage helpers for request, proof, and report screens
Added workflow stage strip to Client Reports, Proof Review, Report Builder, and Report Archive
Unified major stage names: Client Request, Pending Dispatch, Guard Assigned, Guard Accepted, Patrol In Progress, Proof Uploaded, Job Completed, Proof Review, Report Builder, Published Report
Client Reports now uses Published Report language instead of generic Completed for final reports
Proof Review now uses Needs Review wording for actionable pending proof
Report Archive badges now read Published Report, Draft Report, and Scheduled Report
Guard Completed jobs now show whether a job is waiting for report creation, proof review, or already published
Client request rows now use the same workflow-stage labels used elsewhere in the app
Preserved v3.0.72 global report/proof count clarity
